insight_events.title: Leadership / governance risk elevated
insight_events.summary: Leadership / governance risk elevated. Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) CEO exercises 18,083 RSU equivalents, returns shares - Stock Titan; BAC Stock Hits Record High After Q2 Earnings – Bank Of America CEO Says It’s A ‘Good Environment’ For AI Buildout - Trad
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change confidence in management alignment, oversight, or execution.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Check transaction context, trading plans, and whether the pattern is unusual for this issuer.

insight_events.title: Operating cash flow accelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating cash flow growth moved from -37.5% to +86.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
